Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2000 "SNAKEPIT-2000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Snake-Pit.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Made the following changes to allow joystick button in port two to restart the game after dying, not just the S key: 1. Patched the LDA $1F17 instruction at $0FDB to be JSR $1300 instead 2. Added a small routine at $1300 which first checks $1F17 (this will be $01 if the player has died). If it is not $01, it simply returns. If it is, then it checks the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then it sets $C5 to $0D and returns, which causes the game to restart just as if S was pressed. If not pressed, the routine simply returns to carry on the normal code flow.
